run_step.message: recursive use of an object detected which would lead to unsafe aliasing in rust

terminal_error.message: recursive use of an object detected which would lead to unsafe aliasing in rust

await_exit.message: recursive use of an object detected which would lead to unsafe aliasing in rust

data.platformNote: On this wasm-bindgen toolchain the aborted &mut self borrow from run_step poisons the JS object's borrow guard, so EVERY method on the bricked object re-traps ('recursive use of an object ...') — terminal_error does not reach its null return and await_exit does not return a hanging promise; both re-trap synchronously. The arbiter-internal last_error=None / stuck-Draining reasoning is real but unobservable from JS because the wrapper guard intercepts first.
